summary: The diff implements most of REQ-25: Header.tsx and Footer.tsx both reference the new logo file 'dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png', and neither component applies any bg-* class or background container behind the logo image. The logo is rendered with object-contain at appropriate sizes. However, the actual image file 'dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png' does not appear in the diff as an added file — only code changes to Header.tsx and Footer.tsx are present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded logo image as 'dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated/
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added binary/image file at frontend/public/assets/generated/dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png. The 'ADDED FILES' section lists 'none', so the actual image asset was not included in the diff.
